purpose: Acceptance criteria for future tokenizer experiments; no tokenizer is trained in Phase 1A.

hard_fail_conditions.rule: Any invalid UTF-8 input enters tokenizer training.
Any mojibake detection exists in approved training text.
Any U+FFFD replacement character exists in approved training text.
Any training document lacks an approved source_registry entry.
Any source lacks official license evidence and attribution/redistribution notes.
Any accepted training document is outside Turkish or English.
Special token list or IDs differ from tokenizer_candidates.json.
Any valid eval sample fails exact encode/decode round trip.
Any hostile encoding or malformed eval-only sample is included in tokenizer training data.
Same input/config produces different corpus or tokenizer manifests.

tie_breakers: Prefer the smaller vocabulary if total weighted scores are within 2 points.
Prefer the candidate with lower Turkish tokens-per-character if scores are tied exactly.
Reject any candidate that improves compression by admitting mojibake or replacement-character tokens.
reporting_required: tokens-per-character percentiles by category and language
unknown token ratio by category and language
parameter and storage cost from estimate_vocab_parameter_cost.py
